title: Should You Buy Estee Lauder Stock After A 36% Decline Since 2021?
text: Looking at a slightly longer term, EL stock is down 36% from levels seen in late 2021, compared to a 17% fall in the broader S&P500 index.

title: The Estee Lauder Companies' (EL) Emerging Market Presence Strong
text: The Estee Lauder Companies (EL) has a strong presence in emerging markets, which has been yielding. However, a rising inflationary environment hurts.

title: The Estée Lauder Companies to Participate in the UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fabrizio Freda, President and Chief Executive Officer of The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) will participate in the UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference in New York on Thursday, March 16, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. EST. Interested parties can access the live webcast of the fireside chat on Thursday, March 16th from 9:00 a.m. – 9:45 a.m. EST at http://www.elcompanies.com/investors. The webcast will be archived on the site. The Estée Lauder Companies Inc.

title: The Estée Lauder Companies to Participate in the UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fabrizio Freda, President and Chief Executive Officer of The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) will participate in the UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference in New York on Thursday, March 16, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. EST. Interested parties can access the live webcast of the fireside chat on Thursday, March 16th from 9:00 a.m. – 9:45 a.m. EST at http://www.elcompanies.com/investors. The webcast will be archived on the site. The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. is one of the world’s leading manufacturers, marketers, and sellers of quality skin care, makeup, fragrance, and hair care products. The company’s products are sold in approximately 150 countries and territories under brand names including: Estée Lauder, Aramis, Clinique, Lab Series, Origins, M·A·C, La Mer, Bobbi Brown, Aveda, Jo Malone London, Bumble and bumble, Darphin Paris, TOM FORD BEAUTY, Smashbox, AERIN Beauty, Le Labo, Editions de Parfums Frédéric Malle, GLAMGLOW, KILIAN PARIS, Too Faced, Dr.Jart+, and the DECIEM family of brands, including The Ordinary and NIOD. ELC-F

title: Why Estée Lauder Stock Lost 12% in February
text: Estée Lauder beat estimates in its fiscal second quarter but offered weak guidance on the bottom line. Challenges in travel retail and elevated inventory levels at its retail partners are affecting the company.

title: The Estee Lauder Companies Inc. (EL) Online Sales Aid Growth
text: The Estee Lauder Companies Inc. (EL) is benefiting from a strong online business. It has a solid presence in emerging markets, which bodes well.
